---
title: line-length-limit
description: "Limit source line length."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Limit source line length. Strider default: maximum 80 runes.

## Bad

```go
message := "a source line that extends beyond the configured maximum line length is reported"
```

## Good

```go
message := "keep source lines readable"
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only line-length-limit`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
